global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with bold text and geometric shapes.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to start binge-watching for free.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A vibrant solid green background fills the entire canvas, providing a lively and energetic feel.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large rectangle and a smaller circle are positioned in the center, both in a lighter shade of green, creating a modern and abstract look.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle in a lighter green hue is placed near the center, adding a playful touch to the design.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold black text reads 'Binge starts now' with a smaller line below it saying 'Start free today', prominently displayed in the center.
elements.text_content: Binge starts now Start free today

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: The logo 'NeonCast' appears in a bold font at the top left corner, contrasting against the green background.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom center with the text 'Try for free' in white, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small circular badge labeled 'UGC' in white, positioned at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, modern and playful, vibrant green background, bold text.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered with the main subject shapes behind it, the logo is at the top left, and the CTA is at the bottom center.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Binge starts now, Start free today, NeonCast, Try for free, UGC
